creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text: @Vsevolod Stakhov: You haven't given your maintainer approval via the Bugzilla flags and the PR is assigned to you as well. Is there a problem with the patch required at least on FreeBSD 12.x? Is there some way to help you get the patch in  allowing rspamd to build again until the next upstream release overcomes the need for a local patch?
